concept: Players establish and manage a post-apocalyptic settlement in a frozen wasteland, gathering resources, constructing buildings, researching technologies, and training troops to survive and expand. The core gameplay involves strategic resource management (food, wood, iron, coal) and base building to maintain the city's warmth and population's morale, while engaging in real-time strategy combat against AI enemies or other players on a global map.
name: Whiteout Survival
